reasoning: The control 3.1.20 focuses on verifying and controlling/limiting connections to and use of external systems. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to network security controls such as NetworkPolicies that restrict egress traffic to external systems, ensuring that only necessary and secure connections are allowed. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress can help control and secure external connections.
title: 3_1_20: 3.1.20 Verify and control/limit connections to and use of external systems
